calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Patrick Heard.
James G. Schwartz, Esq.. for plaintiff: Pacific Bell Directory, A Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Paul Howard was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and review of Declaration in support of Default Judgment by E. Rockwell in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Jennifer Black and individual DBA Classique Companion as follows:
Principal $38,366.85
Prejudgment interest $4,004.31
Attorney fees and costs per memo of costs
for a total of $42,371.16, see scanned document for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
